description: Defines the rights, responsibilities, role, and compensation between an employee and the company.
Regulates the terms under which a business rents property or equipment for operational use.
Establishes the conditions for the delivery, quality, pricing, and timelines of goods or services.
Allows the use of a proven business model, brand, and operating system for scalable expansion.
Ensures the ongoing upkeep and operational reliability of equipment, systems, or facilities.
Governs financing, investment, lending, or other financial obligations between parties.
Defines the legal and commercial framework of cooperation between two businesses.
Sets the terms for providing marketing services, campaigns, or promotional activities.
Covers the development, operation, support, or licensing of information technology systems.
Used for contractual arrangements that do not fall into standard agreement categories.
